heading: Responsibilities
label: 11311 Responsibilities
text: In fulfilling the responsibilities assigned under chapter 35 of title 44, the head of each executive agency shall comply with this subchapter with respect to the specific matters covered by this subchapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1131140:1421., , .Pub. L. 104–106, div. E, title LI, § 5121110 Stat. 683Feb. 10, 1996

Procurement of Automatic Data Processing Equipment for Tax Systems Modernization Program; Delegation of Authority, , , provided that:Pub. L. 104–52, title V, § 526109 Stat. 495Nov. 19, 1995“Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Administrator of General Services shall delegate the authority to procure automatic data processing equipment for the Tax Systems Modernization Program to the Secretary of the Treasury: , That the Director of the Office of Management and Budget shall have the authority to revoke such delegation upon the written recommendation of the Administrator that the Secretary’s actions under such delegation are inconsistent with the goals of economic and efficient procurement and utilization of automatic data processing equipment: , That for all other purposes, a procurement conducted under such delegation shall be treated as if made under a delegation by the Administrator pursuant to [former] .”ProvidedProvided further40 U.S.C. 759
